txt_en: Our most beautiful things in the world are by Labour, by human's hand created.
txt_cn: 世界上最美好的东西，都是由劳动、由人的聪明的双手创造出来的。

txt_en: Kindness is a language that the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
txt_cn: 善良是一种语言，聋者能听，盲者能见。

txt_en: From now on, if there is no torchlight, then I will be the only light.
txt_cn: 此后如竟没有炬火，我便是唯一的光。
